2606.11745.title: From Prompts to Tokens: Internalizing Causal Supervision in Vision-Language Model for Multi-Image Causal Reasoning
2606.11745.paper_summary: Visual causal reasoning is essential for understanding and intervening in the physical world, requiring identification of causal variables from visual inputs and reasoning over intervention effects. Despite recent progress, large vision--language models (VLMs) remain brittle at such tasks, especially for interventional and counterfactual queries over multi-image inputs. Most existing explorations inject causal knowledge via textual prompts, leaving causal mechanisms external to model execution and limiting reliable control during inference. To address this problem, we propose BridgeVLM, which internalizes visual causal reasoning by inducing a causal graph from multi-image inputs and converting it into structured Causal Tokens executed by RAMP layers injected into the LLM decoder for causal message passing. We further introduce a unified training interface M3S for fine-grained causal supervision from different granularities (local/global level). BridgeVLM achieves 54.4% accuracy on intervention tasks on CausalVLBench (vs. 33.2% with prompt-level supervision), improves results on Causal3D from 43.6% to 49.0%, and substantially improves causal structure learning on CausalVLBench ($F_1$: 33.4% $\rightarrow$ 75.1%).
2606.11745.paper_summary_zh: 視覺因果推理對於理解和介入物理世界至關重要，這需要從視覺輸入中識別因果變量並推理介入效果。儘管最近取得了一些進展，但大型視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在這類任務上仍然脆弱，特別是在多圖像輸入的介入和反事實查詢上。現有的大多數探索通過文本提示注入因果知識，將因果機制置於模型執行之外，並限制了推理過程中的可靠控制。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了BridgeVLM，它通過從多圖像輸入中誘導因果圖並將其轉換為結構化的因果標記，內化視覺因果推理，這些因果標記由RAMP層注入到LLM解碼器中以進行因果信息傳遞。我們進一步引入了一個統一的訓練介面M3S，以便從不同的粒度（局部/全局層級）進行細緻的因果監督。BridgeVLM在CausalVLBench的介入任務上達到了54.4%的準確率（相比之下，使用提示級別監督為33.2%），在Causal3D上的結果從43.6%提升至49.0%，並在CausalVLBench上顯著改善了因果結構學習（$F_1$: 33.4% $\rightarrow$ 75.1%）。
2606.11745.author: Haoping Yu et.al.
2606.11745.authors: Haoping Yu, Yuanxi Li, Jing Ma
